story.title: COVID-19 Oral History with Brain Whitlock
story.description: The transcript details an interview with Brian Whitlock, President and CEO of the Idaho Hospital Association, focusing on his experiences during the COVID-19 pandemic. The conversation covers his career transition from broadcast journalism to leadership in healthcare and his pivotal role in Idaho's COVID-19 Working Group. Key topics include emergency preparedness, hospital capacity challenges, coordination for resource allocation, advocacy, and policy changes, particularly in telehealth and Medicaid. Whitlock emphasizes the dedication of healthcare workers, highlights the strain of misinformation, and discusses the ongoing impacts of the pandemic on healthcare systems and future strategies.
